Microbiology

Test03-JUL-2023Reference RangeUnit
Bacteria identified in Urine by Culture

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The findings indicate a urinary tract infection (UTI) with significant pyuria, bacteriuria, and positive nitrites, with Staphylococcus aureus identified in high quantity. Hematuria and mild proteinuria are present. Glucosuria is noted, which may warrant further evaluation for diabetes. The low specific gravity could suggest dilute urine. Clinical correlation and prompt treatment are recommended.
